---
title: "Data & Datasets"
subtitle: "Understanding your data before you train anything"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  include:
    categories: "{datasets}"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
---

```{=html}
<div class="pp-series-hero">
  <span class="pp-series-badge badge-e">Series E</span>
  <p class="pp-series-intro">
    COCO, ImageNet, Open Images, annotation formats, dataset bias, train/val splits, augmentation strategies — the data side of CV that most tutorials skip entirely. These posts can be read independently of any other series.
  </p>
  <div class="pp-series-nav">
    <a href="index.html">← All Series</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
